mapper.sql: select o.id, o.order_no, o.member_id, o.member_name, o.member_card_no, o.member_phone, coalesce(nullif(o.member_card_type_name, ''), ct.type_name) as card_type_name, coalesce(o.member_valid_date, m.valid_date) as valid_date, (select count(1) from book_borrow_detail dc where dc.borrow_order_id = o.id and dc.is_del = 0) as total_book_count, o.borrow_status, o.borrow_time, (select max(r.return_time) from book_return_detail r where r.borrow_order_id = o.id and r.is_del = 0) as last_return_time, o.remark, o.dept_id, sd.dept_name, coalesce(nullif(o.last_staff_name, ''), o.first_staff_name) as last_staff_name, o.updated_at from book_borrow_order o left join member m on m.id = o.member_id left join util_card_type ct on ct.id = m.card_type_id and ct.is_del = 0 left join sys_dept sd on sd.dept_id = o.dept_id

where o.is_del = 0 and o.id = #{id}
and o.order_no like concat('%', #{orderNo}, '%')
and o.member_phone like concat('%', #{memberPhone}, '%')
and o.member_name like concat('%', #{memberName}, '%')
and o.member_card_no like concat('%', #{memberCardNo}, '%')
and o.borrow_status = #{borrowStatus} and o.dept_id = #{deptId}
and (o.last_staff_name like concat('%', #{lastStaffName}, '%') or o.first_staff_name like concat('%', #{lastStaffName}, '%'))
and exists (select 1 from book_borrow_detail d where d.borrow_order_id = o.id and d.is_del = 0 and d.book_code like concat('%', #{bookCode}, '%'))
and exists (select 1 from book_borrow_detail d where d.borrow_order_id = o.id and d.is_del = 0 and d.book_name like concat('%', #{bookName}, '%'))
and exists (select 1 from book_borrow_detail d where d.borrow_order_id = o.id and d.is_del = 0 and d.borrow_status = 1)
and exists (select 1 from book_return_detail r where r.borrow_order_id = o.id and r.is_del = 0)
and exists (select 1 from dd_book_purchase_order p where p.borrow_order_id = o.id and p.is_del = 0 and p.order_status = 1)
and o.borrow_time >= #{params.beginTime}
and o.borrow_time < date_add(#{params.endTime}, interval 1 day)
${params.dataScope}
mapper.select: order by o.borrow_time desc, o.id desc

select d.id, d.book_code, d.book_name, d.borrow_qty, d.borrow_status, d.borrow_time, max(r.return_time) as return_time, case when d.borrow_status = 2 then max(r.return_time) when d.borrow_status = 5 then max(p.pay_time) else d.updated_at end as handle_time, coalesce(nullif(d.last_staff_name, ''), d.first_staff_name) as last_staff_name, d.remark from book_borrow_detail d left join book_return_detail r on r.borrow_detail_id = d.id and r.is_del = 0 left join dd_book_purchase_order p on p.borrow_detail_id = d.id and p.is_del = 0 and p.order_status = 1 where d.borrow_order_id = #{borrowOrderId} and d.is_del = 0 group by d.id, d.book_code, d.book_name, d.borrow_qty, d.borrow_status, d.borrow_time, d.updated_at, d.last_staff_name, d.first_staff_name, d.remark order by d.id asc

select o.order_no as orderNo, d.id as detailId, d.borrow_time as borrowTime, o.member_card_no as memberCardNo, o.member_name as memberName, o.member_phone as memberPhone, coalesce(nullif(o.member_card_type_name, ''), ct.type_name) as cardTypeName, coalesce(o.member_valid_date, m.valid_date) as validDate, d.book_code as bookCode, d.book_name as bookName, 1 as quantity, case d.borrow_status when 1 then '借阅中' when 2 then '已归还' when 5 then '已转购' when 6 then '已遗失' when 7 then '已取消' else '未知' end as detailStatusName, (select max(r.return_time) from book_return_detail r where r.borrow_detail_id = d.id and r.is_del = 0) as returnTime, case when d.borrow_status = 2 then (select max(r.return_time) from book_return_detail r where r.borrow_detail_id = d.id and r.is_del = 0) when d.borrow_status = 5 then (select max(p.pay_time) from dd_book_purchase_order p where p.borrow_detail_id = d.id and p.is_del = 0 and p.order_status = 1) else d.updated_at end as handleTime, sd.dept_name as deptName, coalesce(nullif(d.last_staff_name, ''), d.first_staff_name) as lastStaffName, coalesce(nullif(d.remark, ''), o.remark) as remark from book_borrow_order o inner join book_borrow_detail d on d.borrow_order_id = o.id and d.is_del = 0 left join member m on m.id = o.member_id left join util_card_type ct on ct.id = m.card_type_id and ct.is_del = 0 left join sys_dept sd on sd.dept_id = o.dept_id
order by o.borrow_time desc, o.id desc, d.id asc
